himekoNovaCharacterGuide.title: Himeko Nova Character Guide
himekoNovaCharacterGuide.intro: Learn about Himeko Nova's identity, combat role, background, and gameplay position in Honkai Impact 3rd. This guide introduces her character profile, combat identity, and narrative role so players can quickly understand why she is a popular Valkyrja among Honkai Impact 3rd fans.

cards.name: Character Name
cards.description: A Himeko-based character identity focused on powerful battles and heroic storytelling within the Honkai universe.

cards.name: Character Role
cards.description: Himeko characters are known for heavy attacks, powerful burst damage, and close-range combat styles.

cards.name: Combat Identity
cards.description: Himeko's gameplay identity is built around greatsword combat, strong offensive abilities, and impactful attacks.

cards.name: Story Background
cards.description: Himeko is one of the important figures in the Honkai Impact 3rd storyline, known for her leadership, sacrifice, and protective resolve.

himekoNovaSkillsGuide.title: Himeko Nova Skills Guide
himekoNovaSkillsGuide.intro: Understand Himeko Nova's combat mechanics, abilities, and recommended battle usage. This section explains her core gameplay features, including attack patterns, burst abilities, and combat advantages for different battle situations.

cards.name: Basic Attacks
cards.description: Uses powerful melee attacks designed around strong damage output and heavy weapon mechanics.

cards.name: Ultimate Ability
cards.description: Himeko's ultimate abilities focus on explosive damage windows and strong battlefield impact.

cards.name: Combat Mechanics
cards.description: Players optimize Himeko gameplay by managing attack timing, skills, and ultimate usage.

cards.name: Recommended Usage
cards.description: Her powerful attacks make her suitable for encounters requiring high damage output.

himekoNovaBuildGuide.title: Himeko Nova Build Guide
himekoNovaBuildGuide.intro: Follow recommended progression steps for equipment, upgrades, and team optimization. This build guide focuses on improving Himeko Nova's combat performance through equipment choices, character upgrades, and effective team building strategies.

steps.title: Upgrade Character Level
steps.description: Prioritize character progression to unlock stronger combat performance and skill improvements.

steps.title: Improve Equipment
steps.description: Use suitable weapons and stigmata sets that increase damage potential and match her combat style.

steps.title: Build Team Synergy
steps.description: Pair Himeko with characters that provide useful support effects and improve overall damage rotation.

steps.title: Manage Resources
steps.description: Prioritize important upgrade materials to maximize investment efficiency.

quickTips: Focus fire damage bonuses when selecting weapons and stigmata.
Time your ultimate during team buff windows for maximum burst.
Balance crit rate and elemental damage for consistent output.
Invest in skill levels that amplify burst damage first.

himekoNovaTierList.intro: Compare Himeko Nova's performance and investment value among playable characters. This tier overview helps players understand her general combat position, strengths, and value when choosing characters to upgrade.

tiers.description: Himeko characters are recognized for strong offensive abilities and powerful attack animations.
Her straightforward melee combat style makes her easier for many players to understand.

himekoNovaBeginnerGuide.title: Himeko Nova Beginner Guide
himekoNovaBeginnerGuide.intro: A beginner-friendly progression guide covering acquisition, upgrades, equipment choices, and early combat strategies for Himeko Nova. Follow these steps to unlock and develop her effectively while avoiding common progression mistakes.

steps.title: Acquire Himeko Nova
steps.description: Obtain Himeko Nova through official character banners, events, or game-specific recruitment systems when available. Save premium currency before limited character releases.

steps.title: Level Up Character and Core Stats
steps.description: Prioritize increasing Himeko Nova's character level, weapon level, and important combat attributes. Higher levels improve survivability and damage output.

steps.title: Upgrade Key Skills First
steps.description: Focus resources on active combat skills, ultimate abilities, and passive talents that improve fire damage and battlefield performance.

steps.title: Choose Beginner Equipment
steps.description: Use available fire-damage focused weapons and stigmata that increase attack power, elemental damage, and skill effectiveness.

steps.title: Manage Resources Efficiently
steps.description: Avoid spending upgrade materials on temporary gear. Prioritize Himeko Nova's main build before investing heavily into secondary characters.

steps.title: Avoid Common Beginner Mistakes
steps.description: Do not ignore team synergy, elemental bonuses, or upgrade priorities. Building balanced teams improves Himeko Nova's overall performance.

quickTips: Save premium currency for limited banners featuring Himeko Nova.
Match weapon and stigmata bonuses to her fire damage identity.
Build support characters that amplify burst damage windows.
Follow a clear upgrade priority instead of spreading materials thin.

himekoNovaStoryAndLore.title: Himeko Nova Story and Lore
himekoNovaStoryAndLore.intro: Explore Himeko Nova's character identity, narrative role, relationships, and place in the Honkai universe. This lore section collects major character information including personality traits, combat identity, organizational connections, and important story themes.

items.title: Character Identity
items.content: Himeko Nova represents a powerful fire-based warrior archetype within the Honkai universe, known for her red hair, advanced combat equipment, and strong battlefield presence.

items.title: Personality and Values
items.content: Himeko characters are commonly portrayed as confident, responsible, protective, and determined figures who support allies while carrying personal burdens.

items.title: Fire Warrior Legacy
items.content: Himeko Nova follows the series tradition of fire-focused combatants who combine powerful attacks with leadership and emotional storytelling.

items.title: Connection to the Honkai World
items.content: Her story connects with the larger Honkai setting involving advanced technology, battles against destructive forces, and conflicts between humanity and unknown threats.

items.title: Combat Role in the Narrative
items.content: Himeko Nova serves as both a frontline fighter and a symbol of strength, representing courage during major conflicts.

items.title: Character Relationships
items.content: Her interactions with other Honkai characters highlight themes of mentorship, teamwork, friendship, and sacrifice.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Himeko Nova

questions.question: Who is Himeko Nova in Honkai Impact 3rd?
questions.answer: Himeko Nova is a fire-focused Valkyrja character in Honkai Impact 3rd, known for her red hair, greatsword combat, and powerful burst damage as a frontline DPS fighter.

questions.question: What is the best Himeko Nova build?
questions.answer: The best Himeko Nova build focuses on fire damage, greatsword weapons, and stigmata sets that boost elemental damage, paired with team members who amplify her burst windows.

questions.question: How do I get Himeko Nova?
questions.answer: You can obtain Himeko Nova through official character banners, limited recruitment events, or game-specific acquisition systems when she is featured in Honkai Impact 3rd.

questions.question: Is Himeko Nova good for beginners?
questions.answer: Yes. Himeko Nova features a straightforward melee playstyle that is accessible for beginners, while her high damage potential also rewards experienced players who master her rotation.

questions.question: Where can I find Himeko Nova codes?
questions.answer: Himeko Nova codes and rewards are released through official Honkai Impact 3rd channels, including redemption codes, login events, and limited-time special events on HoYoLAB.

questions.question: What element does Himeko Nova use?
questions.answer: Himeko Nova is a fire-element character, specializing in flame-themed attacks, burst damage, and close-range greatsword combat in Honkai Impact 3rd.
